import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/fksms/mini-tokyo-3d/contents/data/train-timetables" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Total files:', len\(data\)\)
print\(\)
header = 'Filename' + ' ' * 52 + 'Size \(bytes\)'
print\(header\)
print\('-' * 77\)
for f in sorted\(data, key=lambda x: x['name']\):
    name = f['name']
    size = f['size']
    pad = 60 - len\(name\)
    print\(name + ' ' * pad + str\(size\).rjust\(15\)\)
")

import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Top-level type:', type\(data\).__name__\)
if isinstance\(data, list\):
    print\('Total entries \(trains\):', len\(data\)\)
    if data:
        print\(\)
        print\('First entry keys:', list\(data[0].keys\(\)\)\)
        print\(\)
        # Show first entry
        print\('First entry sample:'\)
        print\(json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:3000]\)
elif isinstance\(data, dict\):
    print\('Top-level keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
    for k, v in data.items\(\):
        if isinstance\(v, list\):
            print\(' ', k, ': list of', len\(v\)\)
        else:
            print\(' ', k, ':', type\(v\).__name__\)

Bash(curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fksms/mini-tokyo-3d/master/data/train-timetables/jreast-yamanote.json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys

data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

weekday = [t for t in data if 'Weekday' in t.get\('id', ''\)]
holiday = [t for t in data if 'Holiday' in t.get\('id', ''\)]

def to_minutes\(t\):
    h, m = t.split\(':'\)
    return int\(h\) * 60 + int\(m\)

# For the time range, look at FIRST stop departure of each train \(origin time\)
# and LAST stop arrival \(terminus\)
print\('=== WEEKDAY ==='\)
first_deps = []
last_arrs  = []
for t in weekday:
    tt = t.get\('tt', []\)
    if not tt:
        continue
    # First stop departure
    first_stop = tt[0]
    dep = first_stop.get\('d'\) or first_stop.get\('a', None\)
    if dep:
        first_deps.append\(dep\)
    # Last stop time
    last_stop = tt[-1]
    arr = last_stop.get\('a'\) or last_stop.get\('d', None\)
    if arr:
        last_arrs.append\(arr\)

first_deps.sort\(key=to_minutes\)
last_arrs.sort\(key=to_minutes\)
print\('First train departs:', first_deps[0]\)
print\('Last train first-dep:', first_deps[-1]\)
print\('Latest arrival time:', last_arrs[-1]\)
print\('All first-dep times \(first 5\):', first_deps[:5]\)
print\('All first-dep times \(last 5\):', first_deps[-5:]\)
print\('All last-arr times \(last 5\):', last_arrs[-5:]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== HOLIDAY ==='\)
first_deps2 = []
last_arrs2  = []
for t in holiday:
    tt = t.get\('tt', []\)
    if not tt:
        continue
    first_stop = tt[0]
    dep = first_stop.get\('d'\) or first_stop.get\('a', None\)
    if dep:
        first_deps2.append\(dep\)
    last_stop = tt[-1]
    arr = last_stop.get\('a'\) or last_stop.get\('d', None\)
    if arr:
        last_arrs2.append\(arr\)

first_deps2.sort\(key=to_minutes\)
last_arrs2.sort\(key=to_minutes\)
print\('First train departs:', first_deps2[0]\)
print\('Last train first-dep:', first_deps2[-1]\)
print\('Latest arrival time:', last_arrs2[-1]\)

# Show the 00:xx trains - these are late-night trains crossing midnight
print\(\)
print\('=== 00:xx trains \(these cross midnight\) ==='\)
midnight = [t for t in weekday if t.get\('tt'\) and \(t['tt'][0].get\('d'\) or t['tt'][0].get\('a','99:99'\)\).startswith\('00:'\)]
for t in midnight[:3]:
    print\('Train ID:', t['id']\)
    print\('  First stop:', t['tt'][0]\)
    print\('  Last stop: ', t['tt'][-1]\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
